name: Collaboration Hub and Session Recovery Unit

input.name: wsConnect
input.type: { deckId: string; userId: string; userName: string; role: PermissionRole }

output.name: syncEnvelope
output.type: { type: "sync"; payload: { update: string; collaborators: Array<{ userId: string; userName: string; role: PermissionRole; activeSlideId?: string }>; deckId: string; userId: string } }

validate.v1: viewer role cannot emit update mutations
validate.v2: incoming update payload must decode from base64 before Y.applyUpdate
validate.v3: invalid socket messages return structured error envelope

constraints: Heartbeat timeout removes stale clients after 60s inactivity
Session cleanup applies max-age retention policy
description: Maintains collaborative Yjs document sync, presence fan-out, and per-user session recovery snapshots.
